targets.notes: By FY25 and annually thereafter, achieve and maintain 100% renewable electricity for operations and data centers to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions in line with a 1.5 degrees Celsius global temperature rise.
targets.title: Scope 1 and 2 100% renewable electricity by FY25
targets.unit: % renewable electricity for operations and data centers

targets.boundary: Manufacturing suppliers comprising Scope 3 category 1 Purchased Goods and Services
targets.notes: By FY26, engage manufacturing suppliers comprising at least 67% of Scope 3 category 1 GHG emissions with the goal of effecting supplier adoption of science-based targets aligned with limiting temperature rise to 1.5 degrees Celsius.
targets.title: Scope 3 supplier engagement by FY26
targets.unit: % of Scope 3 category 1 GHG emissions from manufacturing suppliers engaged
